title: FreePBX security advisory (AV26–579)
description: On June 10, 2026, FreePBX published a security advisory to address a vulnerability in the following product:
products: FreePBX Security-Reporting music (FreePBX 16)  versions 16.0.4 and prior
FreePBX Security-Reporting music (FreePBX 17)  versions 17.0.6 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
